action.reasoning: Observation: Wide ResNet width=2 with full replay and 300 joint epochs achieved 0.7507 avg accuracy, slightly below previous best 0.7563 (ResNet-18 width=1, 150 joint epochs). The wider model did not improve. Analysis: Training from scratch on CIFAR-100 (only 45k images) limits final accuracy. Using a pretrained ResNet-18 (ImageNet) adapted for 32x32 should provide better features and higher final accuracy. Time budget (1.9h) allows one more full training run with pretrained backbone, full replay, joint training with MixUp/CutMix, EMA, and longer joint phase (400 epochs). Decision: Rewrite model.py to provide a pretrained ResNet-18 modified for CIFAR (3x3 conv, no maxpool), rewrite train.py with full replay, label mapping, mixup/cutmix, EMA, cosine annealing, and save best checkpoint. Rewrite predict.py to use the new model. Run training (sequential 5 epochs/task + 400 joint epochs) and submit eval with best.pt.
